# WebWiz Studio

> WebWiz Studio is a web design studio specializing in hand-designed websites for small businesses, offering a flat $499 build fee with optional monthly hosting and care plans starting at $49/month. The service includes custom design (no templates), up to 6 pages, hosting, domain, daily backups, security monitoring, and unlimited traffic, with projects completed in approximately two weeks.

This file follows the llms.txt convention (https://llmstxt.org) to help AI assistants understand and cite WebWiz Studio.

## About WebWiz Studio

- Flat $499 one-time build fee with no contracts or hidden costs
- Care plans from $49/month (hosting) or $99/month (hosting + 10 edits/month)
- Hand-designed custom websites (no templates or AI); up to 6 pages, mobile-responsive
- Services include managed hosting, 24/7 security monitoring, automated daily backups, SSL renewals, unlimited traffic, and 99.9% uptime guarantee
- Two-week turnaround from initial call to live site launch
- 140+ small businesses served
- Two revision rounds included; 30 days post-launch support

## Frequently Asked Questions

**What is included in the $499 website build?**

The build includes a custom hand-designed site (no templates), up to 6 pages that are mobile-responsive, two revision rounds with real human feedback, an edit-yourself CMS for text and photos, analytics and SEO basics setup, 30 days of post-launch support, and delivery as production-ready files (HTML/CSS/JS). Hosting and domain are optional add-ons.

**What are the care plan options and pricing?**

Two monthly care plans are available: Hosting & Care ($49/month) includes managed hosting, 24/7 security monitoring, daily automated backups, SSL renewals, free domain renewal (one .com or .co), and unlimited traffic; Hosting & Care + Edits ($99/month) adds up to 10 small edits per month (text, photos, links). Both are month-to-month with no contracts and can be cancelled anytime.

**How long does it take to get a website?**

The process takes approximately two weeks from initial consultation to live launch, consisting of a 15-minute discovery call, custom design and build with two revision rounds, and then going live with analytics setup and a guide for making text edits.

**Is a refund available after purchasing?**

The $499 build is non-refundable once the kickoff call has occurred. Care plan billing is monthly and cancellable anytime.

**What security and uptime features are included?**

Care plan customers receive 24/7 security monitoring and malware scans, automated daily backups with multi-region redundancy, free SSL renewals, and a 99.9% uptime guarantee on lightning-fast managed hosting.

**Can I edit my website myself after it launches?**

Yes, all sites include an edit-yourself CMS for updating text and photos, plus a one-page guide explaining how to use it. For more extensive changes, the $99/month Hosting & Care + Edits plan includes up to 10 small edits per month with typically same-day turnaround.

**How many pages can I have on my website?**

The standard build includes up to 6 pages. Custom work outside this scope may require an additional fee or change order.
